description_long: This rifle features a compact, angular receiver with a matte dark finish, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The barrel is long and slender, extending from the front of the receiver and ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The stock is a solid, blocky structure, likely fixed, and appears to be integrated with the main body, providing stability for aiming. A cylindrical component is attached beneath the rear of the receiver, possibly serving as a counterweight or part of the stock assembly. The rifle lacks visible external magazines, suggesting an internal or non-detachable magazine design. There are no visible advanced sighting systems, with only basic iron sights or mounting points present.
description: A modern, compact rifle with a matte dark finish, long slender barrel, and a solid integrated stock. It features a blocky receiver and minimal external attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular receiver, long barrel, and cylindrical rear component beneath the stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle and the symmetrical, blocky receiver profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same angular receiver and barrel, with the cylindrical rear component visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid stock and cylindrical component, with the barrel extending away.
